title: psychotria angustibracteata
intro: Psychotria angustibracteata, also known as the narrow-bracted wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria angustibracteata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
